raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California Democrats have created the most expensive operating environment in the United States.",
    "California has the most hostile regulatory climate in the United States.",
    "California Democrats have passed policies that have all but regulated refineries out of business in this state, or forced their closure, therefore limiting gas supply.",
    "When refineries are shut down and over 1000 drilling permits are withheld, it contributes to the increase of fuel costs in California.",
    "California is the only state that requires refiners and producers to comply with a cap and trade tax.",
    "The cap and trade tax in California has yielded over 5 billion dollars and is a cost passed onto consumers.",
    "California's policies have stripped domestic stability, making the state reliant on imported fuel.",
    "California refiners must produce a 'special blend' of fuel that meets low carbon fuel standards not required in the rest of the nation.",
    "The 'special blend' of fuel required in California is more expensive to produce and limits access to fuel from other states.",
    "California's stringent fuel standards and high taxes contribute to the highest gas prices in the nation.",
    "Federal judges have thrown out cases alleging price conspiracies by the fuel industry, finding no basis for the allegations."
  ]
}
```
